error_signature: Google blocked my permission: security error
title: Google permission blocked due to missing HTTPS in webhook URL
symptom: Users encounter a security error from Google indicating that permissions are blocked. The verification status shows 'Verification not required'.
not_this_if: Webhook URL is correctly configured with HTTPS
root_cause: Google requires that all webhook URLs use HTTPS for security reasons. If the URL is missing the 'https://' prefix, Google will block permissions and throw a security error.
fix_steps: Locate the environment variable for WEBHOOK_URL
Update the value to include 'https://' at the start
Restart the n8n instance to apply changes
agent_instruction: Ensure the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable starts with 'https://'.
